ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team participates */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the season starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the season ends */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the league for that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Player's batting hand (left, right, switch) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Player's throwing hand (left, right) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Player's current salary */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to recover */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the injury (minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current recovery status (recovering, recovered) */,
  "doctor" TEXT /* Name of the doctor treating the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the player */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "focus_area" TEXT /* The focus area of the training (e.g., endurance, strength) */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the training session (low, medium, high) */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Name of the trainer conducting the session */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the player about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Coach's area of specialization (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Management) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Coaching, Analytics, Management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
